SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (29091445.pdf)
SUMMARY: Professional with extensive experience in Human Resources in Oil & Gas Company. Want to be part of an organization that allows me to utilize my strongest skills to achieve the goals for the company, as well as my own personal goals.
SKILLS: MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook and PowerPoint), SAP database, Applicant tracking system, Strong organizational and administrative skills, Develop and implement creative solutions with cost, efficiency, and deadlines, Articulate and effective communicator and trainer, Committed to achieving company and personal goals and high quality performance standards

SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Mobilized high volume employees overseas on short/long term in accompanied/unaccompanied status. Point of contact from the beginning till the end of expats/inpat assignment. Directed and implemented human resource policies and procedures and provided guidance to field human resources managers. Created assignment offers compensation packages. Directed employee relations, policy development, training, recruitment, payroll and benefits administration. Attended corporate planning meetings and assisted in re-writing international assignment policies and procedures. Sit in interviews and trained new employees. Administered the Good and Services review program twice a year.

SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Associate Mobilization Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Handled unemployment and workers' compensation claims. Maintained personnel files and updated the company's affirmative action plan. Responded with sensitivity in a timely manner to employee problems and concerns. Presented company policies, procedures, philosophy, and benefits to new employees. Attended corporate planning meetings and assisted in writing policies and procedures. Arranged medical appointments, assignment paperwork, travel, hotel, car rental, temporary housing, and tax briefings. Prepared and processed personnel transfer paperwork. Prepared and distributed correspondence to internal and external candidates. Managed regions: Nigeria, Chad, Indonesia, Algeria, Canada, Qatar.

SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Specialist Administrative Associate/ Tax Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Managed the Tax Equalization Program for Expats and inpats. Collected check payments, verified amounts, and sent them to payroll for endorsement. Assisted expats with completing tax forms and answered questions. Completed check requests for reimbursement of P&I on employees and IRS notices. Initiated move notices. Administered the Certificate of Coverage program for expats on assignment. Ordered office materials and supplies from various vendors. Composed and typed collection letters and other correspondence by email or certified mail. Backed up timesheet keeper and WebPan initiator. Coded and processed invoices and overhead financial numbers.

SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Associate
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Provided administrative or secretarial support. Completed defined tasks in accordance with standard procedures. Supported general business operations by providing simple administrative support activities. Compiled, copied, sorted, and filed records of office activities, business transactions, and other activities. Collected and distributed department and employee mail. Set up pouch mail for new projects. Took passport and visa pictures. Notified payroll, HR, and A&F of employees' new assignments or completions. Structured and maintained a clean and organized office area.

SOURCE: 29091445.pdf
DEGREE: A.A : General Studies
INSTITUTION: San Jacinto College
DATES: 2007
